The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] '''Corjain''' was located within the [[Corjain system/Legends|system of the same name]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], just off the [[Trition Trade Route]]. Barely habitable, the planet supported a large [[Mining/Legends|mining]] industry, with all settlements located deep underground. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet was also the location of a secret [[Bothan listening post|outpost]] maintained by the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]].

==Description==
Corjain was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corjain system/Legends|Corjain system]], located off the [[Trition Trade Route]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]<ref name="tdc" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was connected via [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] to the [[Kolatill system/Legends|Kolatill]], [[Oon Tien system/Legends|Oon Tien]] and [[Charis system/Legends|Charis systems]]. Transit from Corjain to [[Kolatill]] took five [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]], eleven hours to reach [[Oon Tien]], and fourteen hours to arrive at [[Charis]]. Marginally habitable, Corjain's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] was harsh and [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]], requiring all settlements to be built deep underground. However, the planet was rich in metals and [[Ore/Legends|ores]], resulting in large scale [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations. Deep mines covered the planet, and the metals and ores extracted provided a large amount of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|income]] for the local mining guilds. The planet was also the location of a secret [[Bothan listening post|listening post]] run by the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] that was established without the knowledge of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] government.<ref name="tdc" />

==Inhabitants==
Corjain maintained a sizable population, made up primarily of communities of [[Human/Legends|Humans]], [[Jarell]]s, and [[Svivreni]]. A number of Bothans also lived on the planet, manning their secret listening post.<ref name="tdc" />

==Locations==
The [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] outpost on the planet was used as a [[Listening post/Legends|listening post]] and patrol base where the staff kept tabs on the [[DarkStryder Campaign|mission]] conducted by the modified New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''<ref name="tdc" /> to track down [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]—who had fled his [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] in the wake of a New Republic [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|assault]].<ref name="tsb">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> The outpost was also used to monitor the provisional New Republic government installed on Kal'Shebbol following its liberation by New Republic [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]].<ref name="tdc" />

==Behind the scenes==
Corjain was described in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].
